overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player navigates from a neon-lit street corner through a narrow alley and onto open streets beneath an elevated highway, passing holographic advertisements and vibrant neon signs. The atmosphere features dense cyberpunk aesthetics with cyan and magenta neon lighting, wet reflective pavement, and futuristic urban architecture.

events.description: turns left from main street into narrow alleyway between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the building facade and entering a narrow neon-lit alleyway

entered.detail: large circular yellow and white sign with 'SPHERE' text on building facade
curved digital billboard displaying animated advertisements on building corner
tall blue and white vending machine with illuminated display
white concrete bench with trash items on seat
graffiti-covered concrete wall with air conditioning units
dark building wall with pipes and utility boxes

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a street corner with a prominent 'SPHERE' sign and a large curved digital billboard. The camera moves forward along the building facade, passing a vending machine and concrete bench, then turns left into a narrow alleyway. The space becomes enclosed between high walls with graffiti, creating an intimate corridor with wet reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved city street beneath elevated highway

events.description: exits narrow alley back onto open street and turns right
begins walking along curved road following the street bend

agents.ego_description: navigating the open street with the elevated highway structure visible ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning across the street with support pillars
metal safety railing along the edge of the sidewalk
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the alley, the scene opens into a wide urban street with the massive elevated highway overpass dominating the view ahead. The camera turns right and follows the curved road, with distant skyscrapers visible on the left and street railings lining the sidewalk. The transition from enclosed alley to open street reveals the scale of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway under highway overpass with neon signage

events.description: passes under the overpass structure entering the sheltered commercial area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past storefronts and a food vendor beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing beside a cart with illuminated umbrella

entered.detail: bright red neon sign for 'BURRITO XXL' restaurant
large pink neon sign spelling 'BOHEMIA' on building facade
street food cart with glowing display case and umbrella
thick concrete pillars supporting the highway above

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive overpass structure, the environment becomes semi-covered with thick concrete pillars lining the path. The camera passes vibrant neon signs including a red 'BURRITO XXL' and pink 'BOHEMIA' signage. A food vendor stands beside their illuminated cart on the right, while the highway structure creates a canopy overhead, changing the lighting to a mix of neon glow and shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection and plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection crosswalk
entering open plaza area with large holographic billboard displays

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and continuing through the open plaza toward large holographic displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the crosswalk in the distance

entered.detail: massive green digital hologram display showing animated graphics and text
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
tall buildings covered in digital screens and neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up into a wide intersection as the camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk. Leaving the overpass area behind, the scene transitions to an open plaza dominated by a massive green holographic billboard. The camera continues forward through the intersection, surrounded by towering buildings covered in digital advertisements and neon lighting, concluding the journey through the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit street corner through a claustrophobic alleyway and out into the sprawling scale of a futuristic urban intersection. It begins by gliding past a curved digital billboard and a vending machine before turning left into a narrow, graffiti-covered corridor with wet, reflective pavement. As the camera exits the alley, the space suddenly expands into a wide street dominated by a massive elevated highway overpass and distant skyscrapers. The path then leads beneath the concrete canopy of the overpass, passing vibrant red and pink neon signage and an illuminated food cart amidst a play of deep shadows and artificial glow. Finally, the scene opens into a wide intersection as the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk, moving toward a massive green holographic billboard surrounded by towering buildings and digital advertisements.
